features.name: Harness Architecture Consolidation
features.description: Consolidate the current task state into root progress.md, remove the old docs/task/TASKS.md current-state entrypoint, and add machine-readable Harness entrypoints. Product task state remains canonical in progress.md; this file is not a product backlog.
features.evidence: Harness validation 100/100 after AGENTS.md reduction to 91 lines; doc:health passed; lint 0 warning / 0 error; typecheck 0 error; ./init.sh passed including test:coverage 53 files / 358 tests and build:check.
